articles.title: NASA's Artemis II has left Earth's orbit, and 4 astronauts now head to the moon - npr.org
articles.description: With the last major firing of its engine, the Artemis II spacecraft is now on a path that will take it around the moon and back.
articles.content:
NASA says the Artemis II mission continues to go according to plan, with its four-person crew seemingly euphoric as they know they're now truly en route to the moon.
